info.name: XML Upload Function Tests
info.description:
Test collection for Azure Function XML Upload with validation.
Includes raw XML tests simulating Business Central instream/outstream and JSON-wrapped format.

variable.description: Azure Function key - leave empty for local dev, add key for Azure-hosted

header.description: Business Central outstream default content type

body.raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<DataRoot xmlns="http://example.com/data" version="1.0">
  <Company>
    <CompanyId>1</CompanyId>
    <CompanyName>Tech Solutions Inc.</CompanyName>
    <Address>
      <Street>123 Main Street</Street>
      <City>Seattle</City>
      <State>WA</State>
      <ZipCode>98101</ZipCode>
      <Country>USA</Country>
    </Address>
    <Employees>
      <Employee>
        <EmployeeId>101</EmployeeId>
        <FirstName>John</FirstName>
        <LastName>Doe</LastName>
        <Email>john.doe@techsolutions.com</Email>
        <Department>Engineering</Department>
        <Position>Senior Developer</Position>
        <Salary>95000.00</Salary>
        <HireDate>2020-01-15</HireDate>
      </Employee>
    </Employees>
  </Company>
</DataRoot>

request.description: Simulates Business Central outstream sending raw XML with text/xml Content-Type. Expected: 200 OK with success=true.

body.raw:

request.description: Simulates Business Central with application/xml Content-Type. Expected: 200 OK.

request.description: Full SampleData.xml payload (2 companies, 3 employees) sent as Business Central outstream. Expected: 200 OK.

body.raw:
{
  "xmlContent": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<DataRoot xmlns="http://example.com/data" version="1.0">
  <Company>
    <CompanyId>1</CompanyId>
    <CompanyName>Tech Solutions Inc.</CompanyName>
    <Address>
      <Street>123 Main Street</Street>
      <City>Seattle</City>
      <State>WA</State>
      <ZipCode>98101</ZipCode>
      <Country>USA</Country>
    </Address>
    <Employees>
      <Employee>
        <EmployeeId>101</EmployeeId>
        <FirstName>John</FirstName>
        <LastName>Doe</LastName>
        <Email>john.doe@techsolutions.com</Email>
        <Department>Engineering</Department>
        <Position>Senior Developer</Position>
        <Salary>95000.00</Salary>
        <HireDate>2020-01-15</HireDate>
      </Employee>
    </Employees>
  </Company>
</DataRoot>"
}

request.description: XML wrapped in JSON body. Expected: 200 OK with success=true.
Minimal valid JSON-wrapped XML. Expected: 200 OK.

body.raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<DataRoot xmlns="http://example.com/data" version="1.0">
  <Company>
    <CompanyId>1</CompanyId>
    <Address>
      <Street>123 Test St</Street>
      <City>Seattle</City>
      <State>WA</State>
      <ZipCode>98101</ZipCode>
      <Country>USA</Country>
    </Address>
    <Employees></Employees>
  </Company>
</DataRoot>

request.description: Raw XML missing CompanyName element. Expected: 400 Bad Request with validationErrors array.
Raw XML missing required xmlns namespace. Expected: 400 Bad Request.
Empty request body. Expected: 400 Bad Request with message mentioning empty body.
Malformed JSON body with application/json Content-Type. Expected: 400 Bad Request.
Health check to confirm the Azure Function host is running. Expected: 200 OK with Welcome message.
